name: IndyCar Predictions
summary: Race forecasts for the NTT IndyCar Series (road, street, oval).
description: Scaffolded on the shared MotorsportVerse core: a IndyCar project tree with DataSource and Predictor seams ready to implement. Inherits calibration, championship simulation, standings, evaluation, drift monitoring, and leakage guards from motorsport-core the moment a data feed is wired.
